jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Say
jobs.location: Chicago, IL, Menlo Park, CA, New York, NY
jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2>
<p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></
jobs.match_reason: Yeshwanth's 4+ years of experience as a Product Manager, including a Senior Product Manager role, aligns perfectly with the 'Senior Product Manager' title, and his strong background in analytics, platform reliability, and an MBA with financial systems coursework makes him an excellent fit for a fintech product role at Robinhood.

jobs.title: Digital Product Manager Lead
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's extensive experience as a Senior Product Manager, strong background in analytics and reliability, and demonstrated leadership align exceptionally well with the responsibilities and implied seniority of a Digital Product Manager Lead role.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Crypto Trading
jobs.location: Menlo Park, CA, New York, NY, Toronto, Canada
jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><h2>Join us in building the future of finance.</h2>
<p>Our mission is to democratize finance for all. <a href="https://www.cerulli.com/press-releases/cerulli-anticipates-124-trillion-in-wealth-will-transfer-through-2048" target="_blank">An estimated $124 trillion of assets</a> will be inherited by younger generations in the next two decades. The largest transfer of wealth in human history. If you’re ready to be at the epicenter of this historic cultural and financial shift, keep reading.</p></
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4.9 years of product management experience, including a senior PM role, strong technical skills (SQL, Python, BI tools), and demonstrated impact in platform reliability and analytics, coupled with an MBA in Management & Information Systems with finance coursework, make them a very strong fit for a Product Manager role at Robinhood, despite the lack of direct crypto experience.
